backlog.title: aios-action full error taxonomy (~30 PascalCase codes)
acceptance_criteria: All canonical codes from S0.1 §7.3 (validation, policy, auth, execution, verification, rollback, infrastructure groups)
Each variant has retryable hint per S0.1 §7.4
Error::cause chain bounded at depth 8 per S0.1 §7.5

backlog.title: aios-action integration tests + golden fixtures
acceptance_criteria: Golden JSON fixtures for representative envelope shapes (successful path, policy denial, rollback)
JCS canonical encoding round-trip golden tests

completed.title: aios-action crate skeleton + S0.1 core types
completed.evidence: cargo build/test/clippy --all-targets -D warnings all PASS; 10 unit tests green; 8 prefix-namespaced ID types + 5-phase FSM + 4-section envelope + 11-variant error subset

completed.title: aios-action canonical encoding + BLAKE3 hashing per S0.1 §8.5
completed.evidence: cargo build/test/clippy --workspace --all-targets -D warnings all PASS; 24 unit tests green (+14 new); canonical.rs (jcs_canonicalize + blake3_hash + blake3_truncated + CanonicalError); Request::request_hash; ActionEnvelope::idempotency_hash; no new workspace deps; JCS subset documented (lex key sort + no whitespace + array order preserved); ECMA-262 number normalization explicitly deferred to T-006

completed.title: aios-action extended ULID prefix registry (S5.3/S5.4/S10.1/S15.2 namespaces)
completed.evidence: cargo build/test/clippy --workspace --all-targets -D warnings all PASS; 32 unit tests green (+8 new); 5 ULID-bodied newtypes (ApprovalRequestId/ApprovalBindingId/OverrideRequestId/OverrideBindingId/ActionRuntimeRequestId) + 1 content-addressed newtype (TransitionPlanId, body = blake3_truncated bytes, no random new() constructor); IdError::InvalidHexBody variant added; all 6 reject Wave-11 colon-separator form; tplan_ body shape pinned to blake3_truncated helper

completed.title: aios-action lifecycle FSM with conditions consistency (S0.1 §6.2 + §6.6 + §6.7)
completed.evidence: cargo build/test/clippy --workspace --all-targets -D warnings all PASS; 57 unit tests green (+25 new, target was +16); ConditionType closed enum (13 variants) + Condition.condition_type refactor; ActionEnvelope::transition_to / add_condition / canonical_conditions_for_phase / validate_phase_conditions; TransitionError enum (IllegalTransition / TerminalPhase / MonotonicityViolation / PhaseConditionMismatch); Execution.phase_changed_at field added; monotonicity (timestamp non-decreasing, True->False flip rejected, terminal-once) enforced; phase ↔ conditions canonicalization per S0.1 §6.6 (Pending=∅, Running={PolicyEvaluated,Sandboxed}, Succeeded={PolicyEvaluated,Sandboxed,Executed,Verified}, Failed={PolicyEvaluated}, RolledBack={PolicyEvaluated,Sandboxed,Executed,RolledBack}); full Pending→Running→Succeeded JSON round-trip with replay validation green
